training_status: not currently training intensively, planning future bulk

benefits.description: Appetite control feels unreal; eating feels calm and controlled instead of impulsive, no food noise
Lost 12 kg (85 kg to 73 kg) over approximately 2.5 months
Tesamorelin noticeably improved recovery, especially around stubborn areas
Sleep quality feels deeper and more consistent with Tesamorelin
GHK-Cu improved skin quality; skin feels smoother, thicker/healthier; minor irritation and blemishes heal faster
GHK-Cu helped with minor aches and connective tissue stress
MT2 noticeably increased libido; more spontaneous drive and higher baseline; previously flat/low drive especially during cuts

side_effects.description: Mole darkening and slightly enlarged moles from MT2; visible difference comparing before/after photos

protocol_notes: Retatrutide was titrated up over 12 weeks: weeks 1-2 at 1mg/week, weeks 3-4 at 2mg/week, weeks 5-8 at 4mg/week, weeks 9-12 at 6mg/week. MT2 dose was lowered and injections spaced more conservatively after mole changes observed, which stabilized the effect. Sourced from grey market. Goal is fat loss first, then transition to clean bulk. Cycle duration approximately 12 weeks total.
